name: Cobra Stretch
description: Lie face down with palms flat on the floor beside your chest. Press through your hands to lift your chest off the ground, keeping your hips and legs on the floor. Straighten your arms as much as comfortable, arching your upper back. Keep your shoulders down away from your ears. Hold and breathe, feeling the stretch through your abs, hip flexors, and lower back. Also known as Bhujangasana.
